parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "statements": [{ "statement": "MATCH (p:Plant) WHERE ($season = '' OR (p)-[:GROWS_IN]->(:Season {name: $season})) AND ($soil_type = '' OR (p)-[:PREFERS_SOIL]->(:SoilType {name: $soil_type})) AND ($moisture = '' OR (p)-[:PREFERS_MOISTURE]->(:Moisture {name: $moisture})) RETURN p.name_en AS name_en, p.name_da AS name_da, p.type AS type, p.edible AS edible ORDER BY p.name_en", "parameters": { "season": $json.season, "soil_type": $json.soil_type, "moisture": $json.moisture } }] }) }}
